title: Review all worker docs for alignment
notes: Reviewed worker design, implementation, reference, and spec docs together. Found and fixed one naming drift: implementation plan now uses pi-worker-supervisor commands as primary and treats pi-worker-status as alias. Confirmed phase 1 remains local-VM-first, SSH/tmux-first, and gateway work stays optional/future.

title: Implement shell-first pi worker supervisor and state files
notes: Added scripts/vm/pi-worker-supervisor with start/status/restart/stop/checkpoint/verify/tail-logs plus background monitor loop, tmux-backed worker launch, and ~/.pi-worker state/heartbeat/health/session/checkpoint files. Added wrapper commands, bootstrap symlinks, verify checks, smoke-test script, fail-inject helper, runtime-checklist script, and README updates. Verified with bash -n plus temp-HOME smoke tests for start/status/kill-recovery/stale/broken-workspace/restart/stop/checkpoint/verify/tail-logs using fake pi binary. Also patched cross-platform timestamp parsing via python3 fallback.

title: Run supervised runtime checklist on real VM session
notes: Installed OrbStack, created Ubuntu 24.04 machine `theo-pi`, bootstrapped packages, installed pi and pi-web-access, started supervised runtime, and ran `pi-worker-runtime-checklist theo-pi` successfully on the real VM.

title: Tune restart/readiness semantics from real Pi behavior
notes: Real VM exposed that supervisor polling was tied to 30s heartbeat interval, delaying crash recovery. Patched supervisor to poll on separate `MONITOR_INTERVAL_SECONDS` cadence while keeping heartbeat writes throttled, then re-ran real VM checklist successfully.

title: Curate dirty repo state and produce commit plan
notes: Created `.agent/commit-plan.md` with commit grouping, suggested messages, unrelated-file review notes, and tomorrow sequence for real-VM verification + commit staging.
